responsibilities: Identify and evaluate emerging technologies through systematic technology scouting to inform new product roadmaps
Design and build rapid prototypes to validate novel concepts and demonstrate proof-of-concept feasibility to stakeholders
Lead cross-functional workshops using design thinking methods to generate and prioritize innovative product concepts
Conduct feasibility studies and technical risk assessments to determine viability of proposed innovation initiatives
Collaborate with R&D, engineering, and business development teams to transition validated prototypes into product pipelines
Draft invention disclosures and support patent applications to protect intellectual property generated through innovation projects
Present innovation findings and business cases to executive leadership to secure funding and resources for new initiatives
Run iterative experimentation cycles to test and refine early-stage product concepts based on user feedback
